description: Bezier tube mesh is a component that allows for making a continuous tube of geometry that is a Bezier curve shape defined by points.

fields.Radius: The radius of the tube (from center to outside).
fields.Points: Curve tangent point/handle array used for the generation of this mesh. Editing this via Mods produces undesirable results where the curve has really sharp bends.
fields.SegmentPoints: How many sides the tube mesh has around it's mid section.
fields.StepsPerUnitLength: How many bends from point to point the tube should have.
